checks.name: standard_verify
checks.command: python3 -c "import html.parser; html.parser.HTMLParser().feed(open('app.html').read())" && grep -q 'executeGAS' app.html && grep -q 'GAS_URL' app.html && echo 'VERIFY_PASSED'

checks.name: gas_write_policy
checks.result: only syncPendingChanges, handleInit, and loadSchedule execute payloads

checks.name: spreadsheet_write_scope
checks.result: spreadsheet write calls remain inside syncPendingChanges or initialization payloads
